title: updated the glassbox readme
summary:
today i finally updated the readme for glassbox. my symbolic regression project was getting messy so i wanted to make the instructions clear. i added the setup steps for the environment and explained how to run the main script.

for a long time, the documentation was just some notes on my laptop. now it is in the repository. people can see how to load their own datasets and set the hyperparameters. i also listed the current features so it is easier to understand what works right now. it took a few hours to write but it looks much better now.
